allow: Bash(curl -s -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/plain, */*' -H 'Referer: https://jp.mercari.com/' -H 'x-platform: web' -H 'x-country-code: JP' -b 'country_code=JP; version=main' https://jp.mercari.com/v2/getCurrencyConversionRate/currency?currency_code=USD)

Bash(curl -sv -A 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' -H 'Accept: application/json' -H 'x-platform: web' -H 'x-country-code: JP' -H 'x-locale: ja-JP' https://jp.mercari.com/v2/getCurrencyConversionRate/currency?currency_code=USD)
